text: 4155 - وَ رَوَى أَبَانٌ عَنْ زُرَارَةَ قَالَ : قُلْتُ لَهُ سَمَكَةٌ اِرْتَفَعَتْ فَوَقَعَتْ عَلَى اَلْجَدَدِ فَاضْطَرَبَتْ حَتَّى مَاتَتْ آكُلُهَا قَالَ "نَعَمْ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4155 - Aban narrated from Zurara who said: I asked him about a fish that leaps out of the water, falls onto dry land, and struggles until it dies.
I said: "Can I eat it?"
Imam (as) said: "Yes."
